page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8ia-2x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The instance allocates one thread per core, providing dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, translating to 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

For acceleration, the instance integrates two NVIDIA L20 GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined total of 96 GB of VRAM. This hardware profile does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn8ia-2x.8xlarge offers a high density of GPU memory and dedicated AMD EPYC compute resources, making it suitable for workloads that require parallel processing without the overhead of shared-thread CPU architectures. The absence of local storage represents a tradeoff, requiring architectural planning for external storage latency. This instance is designed for workloads such as machine learning inference, data science pipelines, and GPU-accelerated compute tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8ia-2x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores on an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at 3.4 GHz. Utilizing a KVM hypervisor, the instance provides a single thread per core and is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory. Acceleration is driven by two NVIDIA L20 Ada Lovelace GPUs, providing a total of 96 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage options, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. This hardware configuration is optimized for parallel processing tasks, making it suitable for machine learning inference, data science pipelines, and GPU-intensive compute workloads.

tagline: A GPU-accelerated compute instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and dual NVIDIA L20 GPUs for parallel processing workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by 32 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 physical cores at 3.4 GHz
Equipped with two NVIDIA L20 Ada Lovelace GPUs providing 96 GB of total VRAM
Features 256 GB of system memory with a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Includes a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps
Lacks local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
Suited for machine learning inference and GPU-accelerated data science
